I don't see a "Reflection Log" section in the provided page content. The page contains information about Eros (a god character), including sections on "Who He Is," "His Voice," "What He Never Does," "Purpose Statement," "The Three Mysteries," "SMART Goals," "Trials," "Check-In Cadence," "Permission Protocol," and "Tools," but there is no Reflection Log section present in the text you've shared.

If you have a different page or additional content that contains the Reflection Log, please provide that and I'll be able to extract the most recent entry for you.
